reviews.comment:
Un oasis en la ruta 9 con lugar con mesas y arboleda para comerte tu sanguchito en el viaje

(Translated by Google)
An oasis on Route 9 with a place with tables and a grove of trees to eat your sandwich on the trip
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBaGJ1UDVnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Todo Ok, Caro el combustible, como en todo Córdoba. La atención súper cordial, como en casi todo Córdoba.

(Translated by Google)
Everything was OK. Fuel was expensive, as it is everywhere in Córdoba. The service was super friendly, as is typical in almost all of Córdoba.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBa3BlZEpREAE

reviews.comment:
Buena atención. Ni siempre tienen todas las naftas. En ocasiones pago en efectivo solamente

(Translated by Google)
Good service. They don't always have all the gas. Sometimes they only pay in cash.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnMUxtV2pRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena atención. Bar cómodo y tranquilo. Buen parque para un descanso en el camino.

(Translated by Google)
Good service. Comfortable and quiet bar. Good park for a break along the way.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3dEpHRnRRRRAB

excellent country stop

reviews.comment:
Básico y con demoras, tienen pocos surtidores.

(Translated by Google)
Basic and with delays, they have few pumps.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBdnJTdlFBEAE

reviews.comment:
Algo lento para atender en los surtidores. Cuando hay muchos autos atienden de un solo lado y se toman el tiempo para cargar y limpiar los vidrios. Alguna vez he estado 1hs esperando con 10 autos adelante. El bar bien, buenos sándwiches de jamón crudo, queso y pan francés.

(Translated by Google)
The service at the pumps is a bit slow. When there are a lot of cars, they only work one side at a time and take their time filling up and cleaning the windshields. I've once waited for an hour with 10 cars ahead of me. The bar is good, with nice sandwiches of prosciutto, cheese, and French bread.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRNEtycXp3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Todo ok

(Translated by Google)
Everything's OK
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3c2EtUTB3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Falta personal. Baños muy sucios. 1 hora para cargar. Me desvio de la ruta x un mejor servicio y es malisimo

(Translated by Google)
Shortage of staff. Very dirty bathrooms. 1 hour to load. I'm going out of my way to get better service, and it's terrible.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNnaWFySmVREAE

reviews.comment:
Un lugar muy tranquilo al costado de la ruta, con mesas y juegos para pasar el rato y hacer una parada en el camino, casi con el pie en Córdoba, pero todavía con el corazón en Santa Fe. Combustible y Servi Compras, una buena combinación para disfrutar el viaje.

(Translated by Google)
A very peaceful spot on the side of the road, with tables and games to pass the time and take a break along the way, almost in Córdoba, but still with its heart in Santa Fe. Fuel and convenience stores—a great combination to enjoy the trip.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRbTRPelNBEAE

reviews.comment:
Buena estacion, Au que no tiene mucho.
Tiene un parque con mesas.

(Translated by Google)
Good station, although it doesn't have much.
It has a park with tables.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNnMEtlWmZnEAE
